en.extract:
The grey longbill (Macrosphenus concolor) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Macrosphenidae. It is native to African tropical rainforest.

The '''grey longbill''' ('''''Macrosphenus concolor''''') is a species of [[Old World warbler]] in the family [[Macrosphenidae]]. It is native to [[Tropical and subtropical moist broadleaf forests|African tropical rainforest]].
